14000.headline: Quill Ingborn the 4th formed an ambition to fulfill a prophecy.
14000.description: Quill Ingborn the 4th formed an ambition to fulfill a prophecy in Nordrim, shaped by Corovar Arora Omen Charge, Prophecy of the Long Road at Nordrim, Crossing Keeper Quill Ingborn the 4th, Counting Creed of Kelwatch.

14001.headline: Prophecy of the Far Step at Nordrim was spoken.
14001.description: Gala Vorhill the 5th spoke Prophecy of the Far Step at Nordrim, a prophecy of journey tied to Counting Creed of Kelwatch and Rivport the Road Father, naming Nordrim as its sign through through ledgers, road news, market bells, and a sealed ledger appearing without hands.

14002.headline: Lorhelm sacred journey of Nordrim was declared.
14002.description: Lorhelm sacred journey of Nordrim is an active sacred journey destiny of Counting Creed of Kelwatch under Rivport the Road Father, pressing Nordrim toward a foretold role because destiny is enforced through tests, public duties, and costly proof.

14003.headline: Corovar Arora Promised Sign became a kingdom goal.

14004.headline: Quavale revelation at Nordrim was witnessed.
14004.description: Quavale revelation at Nordrim was a revelation miracle of Counting Creed of Kelwatch attributed to Lorara the Scale Mother; Nordrim took heart from the sign. Lorara the Scale Mother's usual miracle bias is victory.
